notes: Polished the hosted signed-in header so it shows the email and access level once, with a clear Log out control.
Simplified the Web companion beta page by moving diagnostics and advanced sheet selection behind an expander.
Only shows Create Pathmark sync sheet when a sheet is missing; otherwise the main action is Open sync sheet or Disconnect Google Sheets.
Updated wording to position the hosted tool as the beginning of a Google-Sheet-backed Pathmark Web Companion while the desktop app remains the local Workspace publisher.
